task_completion.description: Open the DreamPlan software and load the sample house project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: DreamPlan Home Design software is open, displaying a 3D or 2D floor plan of a house (Contemporary House).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the living room and locate the standard flat window on the exterior wall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The camera view is focused on the living room area, with the standard flat window visible or selected.

task_completion.description: Delete or remove the existing standard flat window from the living room wall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The original flat window is no longer present on the living room's exterior wall, leaving a solid wall or an empty gap.

task_completion.description: Select a Bay Window from the catalog and place it on the living room exterior wall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Bay Window is visible on the living room exterior wall where the old window used to be. The Windows library/catalog might be open showing the Bay Window selected.

task_completion.description: Save the modified project as 'RenovatedBayWindow' in the Documents\DreamPlan folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or save confirmation showing the filename 'RenovatedBayWindow.dpp' (or '.ddp') being saved into the 'Documents\DreamPlan' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual DreamPlan Home Design GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DreamPlan interface with its specific toolbars, 3D/2D views, and menus, not a generic text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the software's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Windows 'Save As' dialog triggered from within DreamPlan is visible, rather than terminal commands moving or renaming files.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed the window replacement in the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots show the transition from the original flat window to the new bay window in the 3D/2D view, proving the model was edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses DreamPlan Home Design v9.28 on Windows 11. The 'Sample House' project is named 'Contemporary House' in the software. CRITICAL: The task description asks to save the file as 'RenovatedBayWindow.dpp', but DreamPlan project files actually use the '.ddp' extension. Please accept either '.dpp' or '.ddp' as correct in the Save dialog. The expected save directory is 'Documents\DreamPlan'.
